scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @taj/database exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:migrate:dev: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @taj/database exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @taj/database exec prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @taj/database exec prisma db seed
